isi.lyrics:
Lyric xeom boi - Dot

Romanization

Dot — put a dot on us
Say we’re something more than almost love
Dot — baby underline
Where your heart meets mine

Dot-dot, don’t run away
Just say the word and I’ll stay

We’ve been doing this for weeks
Talking every night till 3
Laughing at the things we shouldn’t be
But I don’t mind it

You’re always reaching for my hand
Acting like you’re more than just a friend
But every time I ask you where we stand
You change the topic again

Tell me what you’re thinking
I’m tired of guessing, baby

Dot — put a dot on us
Say we’re something more than almost love
Dot — baby underline
Where your heart meets mine

Dot-dot, don’t run away
Just say the word and I’ll stay

Your eyes say another truth
Every time I look at you
Feels like something already grew
But you won’t call it

You say labels make you scared
But you’re holding me like you care
If you’re feeling everything I feel
Then why’re we talking ’bout fear?

Tell me what you’re thinking
I’m tired of guessing, baby

Dot — put a dot on us
Say we’re something more than almost love
Dot — baby underline
Where your heart meets mine

Dot-dot, don’t run away
Just say the word and I’ll stay

I don’t need the world to know
Just need you to tell me so
If you feel it, let it show
Put a dot on us

Dot — put a dot on us
Say we’re something more than almost love
Dot — baby underline
Where your heart meets mine

Dot-dot, don’t run away
Just say the word and I’ll stay


Hangeul

isi.lyrics:
Lyric xeom boi - So Good

Romanization

You pull me in with just one touch,
didn’t think I’d like it this much.
Guess you make the hard days light,
turn the wrongs into something right.

And I don’t mind the way I feel
it finally feels real.

You’ve been so good to me,
better than I planned.
You turn the simple things
into something I understand.
You’ve been so good to me
baby, take my hand.
I never knew that love
could feel this unplanned.

You show up and the world makes sense,
even with the chaos and the mess.
Didn’t know I needed this
now it’s something that I miss.


Hangeul

You pull me in with just one touch,
didn’t think I’d like it this much.
Guess you make the hard days light,
turn the wrongs into something right.

And I don’t mind the way I feel
it finally feels real.

You’ve been so good to me,
better than I planned.
You turn the simple things
into something I understand.
You’ve been so good to me
baby, take my hand.
I never knew that love
could feel this unplanned.

You show up and the world makes sense,
even with the chaos and the mess.
Didn’t know I needed this
now it’s something that I miss.

isi.lyrics:
Lyric xeom boi - Fallin′

Romanization

Late night on the corner by your street
Didn’t think that I would feel this deep
Something in the way you talk to me
Softly pulls me in

You smile like you already knew
All the little things my heart can’t hide from you
Didn’t plan on falling this soon
But here I go again

I’ve been trying not to read into it
But you make it harder every minute

I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ into you
Slowly, steady, nothing I can do
I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ baby true
I’m fallin’ into you

Your hand brushing lightly over mine
Feels like something changing in the night
Didn’t think the moment had a sign
But maybe this is one

Talking ’bout the dreams we never chase
You tell me you been learning from your mistakes
Funny how I’m seeing your face
In every song I hum

I’ve been trying not to read into it
But you make it harder every minute

I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ into you
Slowly, steady, nothing I can do
I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ baby true
I’m fallin’ into you

If this is love, don’t wake me now
Let me drift a little longer somehow
If it’s you, then I don’t care how
I fall again

I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ into you
Slowly, steady, nothing I can do
I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ baby true
I’m fallin’ into you


Hangeul

Late night on the corner by your street
Didn’t think that I would feel this deep
Something in the way you talk to me
Softly pulls me in

You smile like you already knew
All the little things my heart can’t hide from you

But here I go again

I’ve been trying not to read into it
But you make it harder every minute

I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ into you

Didn’t think the moment had a sign
But maybe this is one

Talking ’bout the dreams we never chase
You tell me you been learning from your mistakes
Funny how I’m seeing your face
In every song I hum

I’ve been trying not to read into it
But you make it harder every minute

I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ into you
Slowly, steady, nothing I can do
I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ baby true
I’m fallin’ into you

If this is love, don’t wake me now
Let me drift a little longer somehow
If it’s you, then I don’t care how
I fall again

I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ into you
Slowly, steady, nothing I can do
I’m fallin’, fallin’, fallin’ baby true
I’m fallin’ into you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric ONiLL - Love Letter

Romanization

once upon a winter time
under the glowing lights
I’d be floating in my thoughts
every word I kept inside
I’m trying to pour them into
the letter I’m writing you now

in the whitest time of year
when the snow diffuses like we’re
in a movie scene for real
seeing you in the snow is like
one little cherry sitting right
on top of the cake you like

I cherish winter for one thing
that you would never know
cause I feel your love much warmer than the spring
under the lights all aglow

even in the winter you give me butterflies
when you take my arm in coldest night
maybe when the winter time is fading
I might wanna hold onto that time

in the whitest time of year
when the snow diffuses like we’re
in a movie scene for real
seeing you in the snow is like
one little cherry sitting right
on top of the cake you like

I cherish winter for one thing
that you would never know
cause I feel your love much warmer than the spring
under the lights all aglow

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Master Wen - My Groove

Romanization

City lights in the rear view glow
Heavy roads, the air feels so low
But there’s someone who truly knows all
The only one who’s been inside my soul
The night’s on fire, I’m ready to show up
My love’s gettin’ louder, can’t keep it for you
Every moment, flowin’ with you
It’s so true

It’s been a long time, still my heart beats for you
Ten years deep, but it still feels so brand new
Every moment, flowin’ with you
You’re my groove
Pullin’ up slow with the sun goin’ down, down
My, my, my heart, it beats for you
Every moment, flowin’ with you
It’s feelin’ just right
You’re my groove

No more voices on the highway
Just your name
In the breeze
Seeing you doin’ your dance
Girl, you glow up
I get so lucky with my baby
Are you really mine, my baby now?
I don’t know, it’s gettin’ real hot
Feels like I might fall out
Coming right now, already on my way to you
I wanna be with you, my baby
Oh, it’s been a long time

It’s been a long time, still my heart beats for you
Ten years deep, but it still feels so brand new
Every moment, flowin’ with you
You’re my groove
Pullin’ up slow with the sun goin’ down, down
My, my, my heart, it beats for you
Every moment, flowin’ with you
It’s feelin’ just right
You’re my groove
My, my groove
My, my groove

It’s been a long time, still my heart beats for you
Ten years deep, but it still feels so brand new
Every moment, flowin’ with you
You’re my groove
Pullin’ up slow with the sun goin’ down, down
My, my, my heart, it beats for you
Every moment, flowin’ with you
It’s feelin’ just right
You’re my groove
My, my groove
My, my groove

isi.albums: 오늘은 취하고 싶어 (Let Me Drown Tonight)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Yang ha jin - 오늘은 취하고 싶어 (Let Me Drown Tonight)

Romanization

haruga ireoge
beotideut jinagago
gwaenchaneun cheok utdaga
ne saenggagi millyeowa

byeoril aninde wae
jakkuman himdeureojiji
honja namgyeojin bam
gwaenhi seoreowojyeo

chamaboryeo haedo
jakku nega tteoolla
doragal su eopdaneun geol
nado jal aneunde

oneureun chwihago sipeo
geunyang chwihago sipeo
neoreul itgo sipeoseo
jamkkan itgo sipeoseo

oneureun chwihago sipeo
geunyang chwihago sipeo
i bam neo eopsi honja
beotyeonaelsu eopseo tto hanjan

chinggudeul apeseoneun
gwaenchana boyeonneunde
mun dathin jibe omyeon
geujeya muneojyeo wa

nega namgin maldeuri
gwitgae gyesok ulligo
amuri jiwobwado
saenggangna michigesseo

han jan deo masimyeon
gwaenchanajilkka haeseo
oneuldo sureul masyeo
ithyeojilkka haeseo

oneureun chwihago sipeo
geunyang chwihago sipeo
neoreul itgo sipeoseo
jamkkan itgo sipeoseo

oneureun chwihago sipeo
geunyang chwihago sipeo
naeil kkaeeonamyeon tto
jeil meonjeo tteooreultende

sarangiran ge
wae ireoge apeun geonyago
amudo moreuge
joyonghi honjaseo ureo

oneureun chwihago sipeo
geunyang chwihago sipeo
neoreul itgo sipeoseo
jamkkan itgo sipeoseo

oneureun chwihago sipeo
geunyang chwihago sipeo
amuri biwobwado
namneun geon neoppuniya

oneureun chwihago sipeo
geunyang chwihago sipeo
i bam da saedorok
neoman tteoollaseo

oneureun chwihago sipeo

Hangeul

하루가 이렇게
버티듯 지나가고
괜찮은 척 웃다가
네 생각이 밀려와

별일 아닌데 왜
자꾸만 힘들어지지
혼자 남겨진 밤
괜히 서러워져

참아보려 해도
자꾸 네가 떠올라
돌아갈 수 없다는 걸
나도 잘 아는데

오늘은 취하고 싶어
그냥 취하고 싶어
너를 잊고 싶어서
잠깐 잊고 싶어서

오늘은 취하고 싶어
그냥 취하고 싶어
이 밤 너 없이 혼자
버텨낼수 없어 또 한잔

친구들 앞에서는
괜찮아 보였는데
문 닫힌 집에 오면
그제야 무너져 와

네가 남긴 말들이
귓가에 계속 울리고
아무리 지워봐도
생각나 미치겠어

한 잔 더 마시면
괜찮아질까 해서
오늘도 술을 마셔
잊혀질까 해서

오늘은 취하고 싶어
그냥 취하고 싶어
너를 잊고 싶어서
잠깐 잊고 싶어서

오늘은 취하고 싶어
그냥 취하고 싶어
내일 깨어나면 또
제일 먼저 떠오를텐데

사랑이란 게
왜 이렇게 아픈 거냐고
아무도 모르게
조용히 혼자서 울어

오늘은 취하고 싶어
그냥 취하고 싶어
너를 잊고 싶어서
잠깐 잊고 싶어서

오늘은 취하고 싶어
그냥 취하고 싶어
아무리 비워봐도
남는 건 너뿐이야

오늘은 취하고 싶어
그냥 취하고 싶어
이 밤 다 새도록
너만 떠올라서

오늘은 취하고 싶어

Lyric IRO - 외딴섬에서 너에게

Romanization

machi jeo meon oettanseome tteoreojyeo
saranamaya handago geugeommani dabirago

jjineun taeyanggwa geochin padoe nan
iyuna uimijocha moreun chaero saratdeon geoya

juwireul dulleobwado nugu hana eomneun
i godokgwa oeroume momburimchigo inneun nal
guhaejwo

itgo itdeon uriran daneoui
geu ttaseuhami dongi teoodeut nae mame pieooreun geuttae
eodiseongga nal gamssaanneun neoui neoui onggie
sesangeul alge dwaesseo

sori eopsi dagaon neon naege
beotyeojwoseo gomapdago ijeneun hamkke gajago

oraen sigani jinaon jarien
jichin nal anajuneun nega gyeote isseotdeon geoya

gasi dotchin maeume maeil sangcheo imneun
i jiogeseo heodeogineun nareul guwonhae jun
hansaram

itgo itdeon uriran daneoui
geu dajeonghami padoga ildeut nae mame millyeooneun geuttae
eoneusaengga nae gyeote inneun neoreul neoreul bon sunggan
sarangeul alge dwaesseo

itgo itdeon uriran daneoui
geu ttaseuhami dongi teoodeut nae mame pieooreun geuttae

bada neomeo tto dareun segyero
adeukhaedo nan naege allyeojun sesangeul geuryeobogo sipeo
mojin bibarami bureoondaedo it’s ok it’s ok be alright
ijeneun uriil teni

ne gyeote isseul teni

Hangeul

마치 저 먼 외딴섬에 떨어져
살아남아야 한다고 그것만이 답이라고

찌는 태양과 거친 파도에 난
이유나 의미조차 모른 채로 살았던 거야

주위를 둘러봐도 누구 하나 없는
이 고독과 외로움에 몸부림치고 있는 날
구해줘

잊고 있던 우리란 단어의
그 따스함이 동이 터오듯 내 맘에 피어오른 그때
어디선가 날 감싸안는 너의 너의 온기에
세상을 알게 됐어

소리 없이 다가온 넌 나에게
버텨줘서 고맙다고 이제는 함께 가자고

오랜 시간이 지나온 자리엔
지친 날 안아주는 네가 곁에 있었던 거야

가시 돋친 마음에 매일 상처 입는
이 지옥에서 허덕이는 나를 구원해 준
한사람

잊고 있던 우리란 단어의
그 다정함이 파도가 일듯 내 맘에 밀려오는 그때
어느샌가 내 곁에 있는 너를 너를 본 순간
사랑을 알게 됐어

잊고 있던 우리란 단어의
그 따스함이 동이 터오듯 내 맘에 피어오른 그때

바다 너머 또 다른 세계로
아득해도 난 내게 알려준 세상을 그려보고 싶어
모진 비바람이 불어온대도 it’s ok it’s ok be alright
이제는 우리일 테니

네 곁에 있을 테니
